name: Andy Luo

projects.title: CryptoGoGo
projects.description: Online Cryptocurrency Community and Trading platform

projects.title: Dynrank.js
projects.description: High-performance dynamic bar chart visualization library

aboutpara:
During the past year of work, I learned a lot not only about web techniques but also the skills to collaborate in an agile team. I have dived deeply into UX/animation implementations, cross-browser compatibility, and project infrastructure.
My favorite language is TypeScript, and I have been learning a backend framework based on TypeScript which is NestJs recently. With the support of TypeScript, AOP style coding like Spring Boot becomes possible and it makes the code clean, beautiful, and efficient.

resume.description: Detail-oriented programmer and fast learner with  1+ years of experience in web development. Passionate about building scalable and efficient web applications. Self-motivated and eager to learn. Team player with good communication skills and agile methodologies.

experiences.position: Jr Frontend Developer at Snappay Inc.
experiences.bullets: Work in a bi-week sprint agile team, Implement visual elements and user interaction for hybrid app and mobile websites, Design web application structure and solutions to the needs, Communicate and collabrate with backend and native side(iOS/Android) colleagues,  Solve cross-browser compatibility issues and bugs, Optimize web app performance and code structure,  Write documents for knowledge transfer and sharing

education.universityPara: During my time at UofT, I have built a solid basis in computer science, mathematics, and statistics. The most useful soft skills I have learned are self-learning and team-working. I have done plenty of projects in teams in many subjects like web app building, OOP software development, machine learning competition, statistical report, etc.
